ab: yawa u i iyan?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: yawa ku i sayheng semarema da kulang.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: makuda u?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: caluwalun dadu, remarevay ku, nu maremay lra puwadanum ku lra.
ch: B:草太多了，我在砍草，等一下要澆水。
en: B:There's too much grass, I'm cutting it, I'll have to water it later.

ab: pulralrangay ku diya melak kananku lingaw di pitaw ay?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: nu ca’anay i iyan?
ch: B:你放在哪裡呢?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: rineca’ kana kangkang i ngidiran.
ch: A:放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: piya u lra kemangkang?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: papiya ku kemangkang, ’apapiyar ku lra nu maremay.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: karuwa ta lra kikulang kananu sinareman na kulang?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: karuwa lra kikulang nani na kulang a, nadu na uma’i mu, adi diya karuwa malruc.
ch: B:這些蔬菜可以收成了，那些樹豆還不能摘。
en: B: The vegetables are ready to harvest, but the beans are not ready to be picked yet.

ab: wa! kemani kana sadu nannu kinerucan na vurasi.
ch: A:(驚嘆語氣)哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: (sighs) Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: pulralrangay ku diya puwa i soko ay?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: makakuda mu?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: temavavukulr mi da vulraw.
ch: B:我們在放漁網抓魚。
en: B: We're releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: sadu na vulraw kani diyamaw?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: sadu lra na ’invang na vulraw i kara’is.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: nu ma’emvang u kana vulraw mu, nu kudayaw ’emvang?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: ku pana’aw kana tapapesuk kana vulraw.
ch: B:我都用魚叉射魚。
en: B: I shoot fish with a spear.

ab: penapana’ u nu pa’a’alrup u?
ch: A:你打獵時會用弓箭嗎?
en: A: Do you use a bow and arrow when hunting?

ab: pinapeciran ku rawa, nu eman mu, mikuwang ku di milralrang ku kana suwan.
ch: B:我的獵物通常都是用陷阱抓的，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: My prey is usually caught in traps and occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: ini na dalan mu, mau tu inlrangan na vavuy.
ch: A:這條路是山豬所走過的。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: man madalram u diyamaw?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: ini mu, mau nantu dinapalran na vavuy, semalra mau tu inlrangan na vavuy ini na dalan.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: ta pakunamunay mukuwa mena’uwa kananta pecir, mupecir lra na rawa kemaku.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，我想抓到獵物了吧！
en: A: Go and look at our traps, I think we've caught our prey!

ab: man madalram u?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: kemawan cemaulr lra na suwan, ta pakunamunay mitulus.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let's follow them.

ab: aeman nanu dinadaway?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: ini mu, pecir a pinangese’, papecir kana tutus.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: aeman nanu pinuwayan i kadu?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: idu mu pecir a sekung, nanta papecir kana ’ura.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: sadu nanta kinarasa harem kana wari, di lrayuwan datu i puvati kanta na mi’a’alrup.
ch: A:今天我們有很多獵物, 我們要感恩“領域之神”的賜福。
en: A: Today we have many prey, let us give thanks for the blessing of the "God of the field".

ab: ai, ta puruma’aw i dekalr di ta pu’acaranay kanna dinkalranan nu kemadu.
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let's take it back to the tribe and share it!
